sections.title: 🚀 New Features
items: **One-Click Maintenance**: Added a 'Record' button directly to the Dashboard overdue/due-soon lists for immediate action.
**Machine List Maintenance**: The wrench icon in the Machines list is now functional, allowing quick access to maintenance recording for any machine.
**Service Management**: You can now Add, Edit, and Delete individual maintenance services (tasks) for each machine directly from the application.
**Emergency Menu**: Added 'Emergency Maintenance' option to the File > New menu for faster access during critical breakdown events.

sections.title: ✨ Improvements
items: **Smart Defaults**: Maintenance recording forms now start with no services selected by default to prevent accidental data entry.
**Machine Stats**: Machines now dynamically calculate their 'Last' and 'Next' maintenance dates based on their service history.
**Role Management**: Enhanced support for user role assignments and permissions handling in the Admin Panel.
**Clean Up**: Removed legacy 'Cycle Status' logic to focus on calendar-based preventive maintenance.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed an issue with Dashboard 'Due Soon' logic displaying incorrect items.
Corrected maintenance date display formats across the application.
Aligned backend permissions for Audit Task completion with frontend roles.
Resolved the 'Logout' bug where sessions were essentially sticky.

sections.title: 🚀 New Features
items: **Enhanced Sync System**: Complete overhaul of the offline-to-online synchronization engine for better reliability and conflict resolution.
**Maintenance History**: You can now view historical maintenance records directly from the machine details.
**Remember Me**: Added 'Remember Me' functionality to keep you logged in securely across sessions.
**Onboarding Tour**: New interactive tour to help new users get started with the application.
**What's New**: This popup! Stay informed about the latest changes and improvements.

sections.title: ✨ Improvements
items: **Data Integrity**: Added P.O. Number and Work Order Number fields to maintenance completion forms.
**User Permissions**: Fixed critical issues with site assignment and visibility. Users now correctly see only their assigned sites.
**Security**: Implemented stricter Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) across the entire application.
**Performance**: Optimized database queries for faster page loads and smoother transitions.

sections.title: 🐛 Bug Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where the application would crash during sync if the internet connection was unstable.
Resolved a schema mismatch that prevented some maintenance tasks from syncing to the cloud.
Fixed the 'Logout' button not always clearing the session correctly.

sections.title: ⚠️ Known Issues
items: **Loading Bar**: The application launching loading bar may bounce back and forth. This is visual only and does not affect loading.
**Login Flow**: You may see a success message flash briefly before the dashboard loads. We are working on smoothing this out.
**Emergency Maintenance**: Currently requires PO and Work Order numbers, which may not be available at the time of request.
**Report Preview**: The preview window only shows the first page of results. However, **printing works correctly** and will include all pages.
**Accessibility**: Dark mode and High Contrast mode are currently experimental and may not apply to all screens.
**Window Scaling**: Extreme window resizing may cause some elements to become inaccessible. We recommend using the default window size for now.

sections.title: 📞 Support & Feedback
items: If you experience any issues or want to provide feedback, please email us at **techsupport@accuratemachinerepair.com**.
